mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_recipe_rating_log ( recipe_id, user_id, score ) VALUES ( #{recipeId}, #{userId}, #{score} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE score = VALUES(score), last_change_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO t_recipe_rating ( recipe_id, rating_avg, rating_count ) SELECT #{recipeId}, ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(score), 0), 2), COUNT(1) FROM t_recipe_rating_log WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE rating_avg = VALUES(rating_avg), rating_count = VALUES(rating_count)
mapper.select: SELECT r.recipe_id, IFNULL(rr.rating_avg, 0.00) AS rating_avg, IFNULL(rr.rating_count, 0) AS rating_count, rl.score AS user_score FROM t_recipe r LEFT JOIN t_recipe_rating rr ON rr.recipe_id = r.recipe_id LEFT JOIN t_recipe_rating_log rl ON rl.recipe_id = r.recipe_id AND rl.user_id = #{userId} WHERE r.recipe_id = #{recipeId} AND r.recipe_status != 1 LIMIT 1
